completed_tasks.name: Close canonical ingress and protected outbound boundary

remaining_tasks.name: Implement SQLite identity, reconciliation, and submission coordination
Serialize SQLite bootstrap and migration initialization

blockers.description: OMP native task isolation supplies protected branch main to gsd-executor. GSD's mandatory executor guard accepts only worktree-agent-* and aborts before edits.
blockers.workaround: None under the selected policy. Repair OMP/GSD isolation branch-namespace compatibility before resuming.

human_actions_pending.action: Repair OMP native task isolation so isolated executors receive a worktree-agent-* branch, or explicitly select a different execution policy.
human_actions_pending.context: Two isolated Plan 01-07 executor attempts aborted before edits on refs/heads/main, including after worktree.baseRef was set to head.

decisions.decision: Pause Phase 01 rather than use sequential main-checkout execution or waive the branch assertion.
decisions.rationale: User selected Pause for harness repair after native OMP isolation could not satisfy the mandatory GSD executor guard.

decisions.decision: Set worktree.baseRef to head during attempted isolation recovery.
decisions.rationale: The native GSD base-check initially reported a diverged origin/HEAD base; alignment succeeded but did not change OMP's protected main branch namespace.

next_action: After harness repair, confirm an isolated native task starts on worktree-agent-*, then execute 01-07 via one isolated gsd-executor task.
context_notes: Plan 01-06 is committed and its focused pytest verification passed. Plan 01-07 made no code, test, summary, tracking, or commit changes because both safety-guard failures occurred before edits. Do not bypass the guard or fall back to main-checkout execution without an explicit policy change.
